posts.text:
"Emotions don't have an expiration date.... every time you said I'm fine, while your chest feels like it's on fire - all of that goes somewhere"

Here is an excellent video that my doc shared with me on a concept called Emotional Debt. I've certainly got a couple lines of credit

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r9uYu8_cISw

I’ve just snagged a couple Yubikeys for adding some hardware based auth to my personal nerd setup. 

I’m curious, anyone else using a hardware key (yubikey or otherwise), how do you best take advantage of them?
